name: calendar-sync
description: Sync DingTalk calendar to iCloud calendar via CalDAV

scripts.start:prod: SYNC_DRY_RUN=false SYNC_ENABLE_DELETE=true SYNC_DELETE_CONFIRM_RUNS=2 SYNC_DELETE_MAX_RATIO=0.9 node src/server.js
scripts.sync:once:prod: SYNC_DRY_RUN=false SYNC_ENABLE_DELETE=true SYNC_DELETE_CONFIRM_RUNS=2 SYNC_DELETE_MAX_RATIO=0.9 node src/cli-sync-once.js
